message: CI: add demo job (uv setup script) and PyPI smoke on tags; add PyPI-only smoke test

files.patch:
@@ -23,8 +23,27 @@ jobs:
         run: |
           cargo test --features "numpy_support test_utils"
 
-  build:
+  demo:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     needs: test
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Install Rust (nightly for portable_simd)
+        uses: actions-rs/toolchain@v1
+        with:
+          profile: minimal
+          toolchain: nightly
+          override: true
+      - name: Install uv
+        run: |
+          curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh
+          echo "$HOME/.cargo/bin" >> $GITHUB_PATH
+      - name: Run setup_and_demo script
+        run: |
+          ./scripts/setup_and_demo.sh
+
+  build:
+    needs: [test]
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
@@ -102,3 +121,19 @@ jobs:
       - name: List wheels on failure
         if: failure()
         run: ls -R wheels
+
+  pypi-smoke:
+    needs: publish
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: github.ref_type == 'tag'
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Set up Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: '3.13'
+      - name: Install from PyPI and run smoke
+        run: |
+          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
+          python -m pip install fast-cmaes
+          python tests/python_smoke_pypi.py

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+def test_import_and_run_sphere():
+    import fastcma
+
+    def sphere(x):
+        return sum(v * v for v in x)
+
+    xmin, _es = fastcma.fmin(sphere, [0.4, -0.6, 0.2], 0.3, maxfevals=2000, ftarget=1e-8)
+    assert max(abs(v) for v in xmin) < 1e-2
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    test_import_and_run_sphere()
